items.line_en: Hello everyone and welcome back to Five Minute English Practice. I'm Jessica.

coach.say: Hello everyone and welcome back to Five Minute English Practice. I'm Jessica.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello everyone and welcome back to Five Minute English Practice. / I'm Jessica.

items.line_en: Today we're going to listen to a real-life conversation at a bank. This is a very common situation.

coach.say: Today we're going to listen to a real-life conversation at a bank. This is a very common situation.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Today we're going to listen to a real-life conversation at a bank. / This is a very common situation.

items.line_en: You try to pay for something, but your card doesn't work and you don't know why.

coach.say: You try to pay for something, but your card doesn't work and you don't know why.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You try to pay for something, / but your card doesn't work and you don't know why.

items.line_en: In this conversation, Lisa goes to the bank because her card suddenly stopped working.

coach.say: In this conversation, Lisa goes to the bank because her card suddenly stopped working.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In this conversation, / Lisa goes to the bank because her card suddenly stopped working.

items.line_en: She talks with a bank teller, explains what happened, and learns how the problem is solved.

coach.say: She talks with a bank teller, explains what happened, and learns how the problem is solved.
coach.hint: Chunk it: She talks with a bank teller, / explains what happened, / and learns how the problem is solved.

items.line_en: Try to listen to how they speak calmly and politely. Now, let's begin.

coach.say: Try to listen to how they speak calmly and politely. Now, let's begin.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Try to listen to how they speak calmly and politely. / Now, / let's begin.

items.line_en: Good morning. Good morning. How can I help you today?

coach.say: Good morning. Good morning. How can I help you today?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good morning. / Good morning. / How can I help you today?

items.line_en: I'm having some trouble with my bank card. It stopped working yesterday, so I came into check

coach.say: I'm having some trouble with my bank card. It stopped working yesterday, so I came into check
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm having some trouble with my bank card. / It stopped working yesterday, / so I came into check

items.line_en: what's going on. Of course, may I see your ID card please? Sure, here you are. Thank you.

coach.say: what's going on. Of course, may I see your ID card please? Sure, here you are. Thank you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: what's going on. Of course, / may I see your ID card please? Sure, here you are. Thank you.

items.line_en: All right, Ms. Carter, I'm checking your account now. Could you tell me what happened?

coach.say: All right, Ms. Carter, I'm checking your account now. Could you tell me what happened?
coach.hint: Chunk it: All right, Ms. / Carter, I'm checking your account now. Could you tell me what happened?

items.line_en: Yesterday evening, I went to the supermarket near my apartment.

coach.say: Yesterday evening, I went to the supermarket near my apartment.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yesterday evening, / I went to the supermarket near my apartment.

items.line_en: When I tried to pay with my debit card, the payment didn't go through. The screen showed an error

coach.say: When I tried to pay with my debit card, the payment didn't go through. The screen showed an error
coach.hint: Chunk it: When I tried to pay with my debit card, / the payment didn't go through. / The screen showed an error

items.line_en: message. Did you try to use the card again? Yes, I did. I thought it might be a problem with the

coach.say: message. Did you try to use the card again? Yes, I did. I thought it might be a problem with the
coach.hint: Chunk it: message. Did you try to use the card again? / Yes, I did. I thought it might be a problem with the

items.line_en: machine, but it still didn't work the second time. I understand. That must have been uncomfortable.

coach.say: machine, but it still didn't work the second time. I understand. That must have been uncomfortable.
coach.hint: Chunk it: machine, / but it still didn't work the second time. / I understand. / That must have been uncomfortable.

items.line_en: It really was. There were people waiting behind me, and I felt quite embarrassed.

coach.say: It really was. There were people waiting behind me, and I felt quite embarrassed.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It really was. / There were people waiting behind me, / and I felt quite embarrassed.

items.line_en: In the end, I paid with cash, but I was worried something might be wrong.

coach.say: In the end, I paid with cash, but I was worried something might be wrong.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In the end, / I paid with cash, / but I was worried something might be wrong.

items.line_en: Did you receive any message from the bank after that? A text or an email? No, I didn't receive

coach.hint: Chunk it: Did you receive any message from the bank after that? / A text or an email? / No, / I didn't receive

items.line_en: anything. That's why I'm concerned. All right, please give me a moment while I check your account

coach.say: anything. That's why I'm concerned. All right, please give me a moment while I check your account
coach.hint: Chunk it: anything. / That's why I'm concerned. / All right, / please give me a moment while I check your account

items.line_en: activity. Okay. Thank you for waiting. I can see what happened now. Your card was automatically

coach.hint: Chunk it: activity. Okay. / Thank you for waiting. I can see what happened now. Your card was automatically

items.line_en: last night blocked. That sounds serious. Why was it blocked? It's a security measure.

coach.say: last night blocked. That sounds serious. Why was it blocked? It's a security measure.
coach.hint: Chunk it: last night blocked. / That sounds serious. / Why was it blocked? / It's a security measure.

items.line_en: Our system noticed some unusual activity and blocked the card to protect your account.

coach.say: Our system noticed some unusual activity and blocked the card to protect your account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Our system noticed some unusual activity and / blocked the card to protect your account.

items.line_en: Unusual activity. What kind of activity? There were several attempts to use your card for

coach.say: Unusual activity. What kind of activity? There were several attempts to use your card for
coach.hint: Chunk it: Unusual activity. / What kind of activity? / There were several attempts to use your card for

items.line_en: online payments on a foreign website. That wasn't me. I didn't buy anything online last night.

coach.say: online payments on a foreign website. That wasn't me. I didn't buy anything online last night.
coach.hint: Chunk it: online payments on a foreign website. / That wasn't me. / I didn't buy anything online last night.

items.line_en: That's exactly why the system reacted. It didn't match your normal spending pattern.

coach.say: That's exactly why the system reacted. It didn't match your normal spending pattern.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's exactly why the system reacted. / It didn't match your normal spending pattern.

items.line_en: So someone tried to use my card? It's possible. But the good news is that the transactions

coach.say: So someone tried to use my card? It's possible. But the good news is that the transactions
coach.hint: Chunk it: So someone tried to use my card? / It's possible. / But the good news is that the transactions

items.line_en: were stopped. Does that mean I lost money? No, not at all. Your balance is safe and no money

coach.hint: Chunk it: were stopped. Does that mean I lost money? / No, not at all. Your balance is safe and no money

items.line_en: was taken from your account. Oh, that's such a relief. I was really worried. That's completely

coach.hint: Chunk it: was taken from your account. Oh, / that's such a relief. I was really worried. That's completely

items.line_en: understandable. Many people feel anxious in this situation. I'm usually very careful with my card.

coach.say: understandable. Many people feel anxious in this situation. I'm usually very careful with my card.
coach.hint: Chunk it: understandable. / Many people feel anxious in this situation. / I'm usually very careful with my card.

items.line_en: I don't share my details and I don't shop online very often. Sometimes it can happen without

coach.hint: Chunk it: I don't share my details and I don't shop online very often. / Sometimes it can happen without

items.line_en: you noticing. Public Wi-Fi or unsafe websites can expose card information. That's scary.

coach.hint: Chunk it: you noticing. / Public Wi-Fi or unsafe websites can expose card information. / That's scary.

items.line_en: It makes me feel nervous about using my card. I understand. The important thing is that the system

coach.hint: Chunk it: It makes me feel nervous about using my card. / I understand. / The important thing is that the system

items.line_en: worked and protected your account. So what should I do now? You have two options. We can unblock

coach.say: worked and protected your account. So what should I do now? You have two options. We can unblock
coach.hint: Chunk it: worked and protected your account. / So what should I do now? / You have two options. / We can unblock

items.line_en: your current card or we can cancel it and issue a new one. Which option do you recommend?

coach.say: your current card or we can cancel it and issue a new one. Which option do you recommend?
coach.hint: Chunk it: your current card or we can cancel it and issue a new one. / Which option do you recommend?

items.line_en: For security reasons, I recommend getting a new card. All right. How long will it take?

coach.say: For security reasons, I recommend getting a new card. All right. How long will it take?
coach.hint: Chunk it: For security reasons, / I recommend getting a new card. / All right. / How long will it take?

items.line_en: It usually takes about five to seven business days. That's almost a week.

coach.say: It usually takes about five to seven business days. That's almost a week.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It usually takes about five to seven business days. / That's almost a week.

items.line_en: Can I still use my money during that time? Yes, of course your account is active. Only the card

coach.say: Can I still use my money during that time? Yes, of course your account is active. Only the card
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can I still use my money during that time? / Yes, / of course your account is active. / Only the card

items.line_en: is blocked. What about my salary and bills? They will continue as usual. There will be no interruption.

coach.say: is blocked. What about my salary and bills? They will continue as usual. There will be no interruption.
coach.hint: Chunk it: is blocked. / What about my salary and bills? / They will continue as usual. / There will be no interruption.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay. That's good. / Let's get a new card then. All right. I just need you to confirm your address

coach.hint: Chunk it: You did the right thing by coming in quickly. / Everything was handled in time. / I'm really glad

items.line_en: bank card, don't panic. Take a deep breath. Explain what happens step by step and ask simple questions.

items.line_en: You don't need difficult words. Clear and polite English is always enough.

coach.say: You don't need difficult words. Clear and polite English is always enough.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You don't need difficult words. / Clear and polite English is always enough.

items.line_en: Remember, improving your English doesn't happen overnight. It happens one small step at a time.

coach.say: Remember, improving your English doesn't happen overnight. It happens one small step at a time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Remember, / improving your English doesn't happen overnight. / It happens one small step at a time.

items.line_en: Practicing a little every day is much better than practicing a lot just once a week.

coach.say: Practicing a little every day is much better than practicing a lot just once a week.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Practicing a little every day is much better than practicing a lot just once a week.
